panels.title: Screener Runs (all)
panels.description: Esecuzioni screener completate (CLI + web). Usa screener_run_count_total emesso direttamente da run_screener().

panels.title: Session Resets (VPN/riavvio)
panels.description: Ogni reset indica una sessione curl_cffi stale invalidata (es. VPN reconnect, riavvio server)

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (http_method, http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_sum[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (http_method, http_route) (rate(http_server_request_duration_milliseconds_count[$__rate_interval])))
